title: Compliance: python/src/lichen/link/link_layer.py link signatures
description: Policy: 06-security.md §8.3-8.5. File: python/src/lichen/link/link_layer.py. Status: COMPLIANT. TX path (send L206-275): Signs with sign() at L239 before building frame, appends signature to payload, sets signature_present=True. RX path (receive L326-460): Parses frame, checks signature_present, verifies via _find_sender() which calls verify(), implements key pinning (L402-411), performs replay check (L421-430).
